image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Trillions of neutrinos are streaming through your body right now.
Context visual: These ghostly particles are so small, they rarely interact with anything.
Escalation visual: Neutrinos are born from the sun, cosmic rays, and even nuclear reactions on Earth.
Evidence visual: Billions of them pass through every square inch of your body every second—without you even noticing.
Payoff visual: Their weak interaction means they can travel through planets like they’re nothing.
Cta visual: Curious to learn more about these mysterious particles? Like and follow for deeper dives into physics!
